about.title: About Me
about.header: Short introduction about me and my skill

description.paragraph-1: I'm a Frontend Web Developer with 2+ years of experience building modern, responsive, and interactive web applications, with a strong focus on user interface development and performance optimization.
description.paragraph-2: I specialize in developing scalable UI components, improving user experience, and ensuring smooth integration with backend systems
description.paragraph-3: Throughout my career, I have worked with modern JavaScript technologies including React.js, Vue.js, Svelte.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, as well as collaborating closely with backend and QA teams.
description.paragraph-4: Previously, I worked on multiple projects in healthcare, insurance, and enterprise systems, where I contributed to building dashboards, improving system performance, and enhancing UI consistency for better usability.
description.paragraph-5: Outside of work, I enjoy exploring new technologies, building small projects, and continuously improving my skills to create better and more impactful digital experiences.
